channel.title: RoundSignal - Weekly funded-startup signals
channel.description: Each week: freshly-funded startups, the role to contact, and a ready-to-send angle.

item.title: RoundSignal 2026-W28: 8 freshly-funded accounts to sell to this week
item.description:
RoundSignal Issue 2026-W28

Freshly-funded B2B SaaS & tech startups (pre-seed -> Series B)

8 trigger-ready accounts, scored and contextualized.

geoSurge

heat 88

Trigger: €10M ($12M) Seed round led by AlbionVC (EU-Startups & Let's Data Science, as of 2026-07-03)

Why now: Fresh seed capital and an explicit plan to expand global research and engineering teams means immediate hiring, brand and go-to-market needs — perfect timing for recruiting, growth and PR sellers. The company's own product is about AI brand visibility, so they value marketing sophistication.

Who to contact: Founder/CEO or Head of Growth

Angle: Reference their Corpus Engineering discipline: offer a positioning/PR sprint to make geoSurge itself the reference brand cited in generative AI answers while they scale the eng team.

source

Worldmodeldata

heat 85

Trigger: €8M (£7M) Seed round led by Iona Star Capital, emerging from stealth (EU-Startups & Tech.eu, as of 2026-07-06)

Why now: Just out of stealth with seed funding and a stated goal to hit 1M hours of training data — they'll be racing to build engineering/data teams and public presence, creating dev, recruiting and PR openings within the 48h window.

Who to contact: Founder/CEO (Rhea Loucas) or Head of Engineering

Angle: Congratulate them on the stealth reveal and Ex-Meta board addition; pitch a data-ops/engineering scaling plan to reach 1M hours of gameplay training data faster than rivals.

source

Sherpa.ai

heat 78

Trigger: $18M funding round to accelerate its enterprise AI privacy/security platform (Tech.eu, as of 2026-07-06)

Why now: An $18M raise aimed at accelerating platform development for enterprises signals hiring and enterprise go-to-market scaling — a strong fit for RevOps, growth and technical recruiting service providers.

Who to contact: VP Sales/RevOps or CEO · info@sherpa.ai

Angle: Offer to stand up an enterprise-grade RevOps + demand-gen motion tuned to data-sovereignty buyers as they deploy the new capital.

source

Stoa

heat 72

Trigger: €2.1M / $2.4M pre-Seed co-led by Bespokeist Partners and Ingenii Capital (EU-Startups & Tech.eu, as of 2026-07-06)

Why now: Fresh pre-seed fintech with an explicit mandate to accelerate growth of its cash management platform — early enough that fractional CFO, growth and design help can shape their launch. Multi-source corroboration raises confidence.

Who to contact: Founder/CEO or Head of Growth

Angle: Offer a fintech-savvy growth/lifecycle setup to convert idle-cash prospects into activated business accounts as they deploy the pre-seed.

source

CurifyLabs

heat 70

Trigger: €12M ($14M) Series A co-led by Sandwater and HealthCap (EU-Startups & Tech.eu, as of 2026-07-06)

Why now: Series A explicitly funds U.S. expansion, supply chain build-out and customer support scaling — concrete triggers for recruiting, RevOps and go-to-market service providers. Corroborated across two sources.

Who to contact: COO or VP US Operations · info@curifylabs.com

Angle: Pitch a US-market entry playbook (hiring, customer support ops, GTM) timed to their announced expansion push.

source

Seltz

heat 63

Trigger: $12.5M Seed funding to rebuild web search for AI agents (Fortune/Yahoo, as of 2026-06-24)

Why now: A sizable seed for an AI-agent infrastructure startup means aggressive engineering hiring and early brand-building — a fit for dev, recruiting and PR sellers, though the raise is ~2 weeks old so value is decaying.

Who to contact: Founder/CEO or Head of Engineering

Angle: Offer specialized AI/infra recruiting or developer-relations support to help them ship an agent-native search product quickly.

source

Lucida

heat 52

Trigger: £5.3M Seed round (Slator, as of 2026-07-06)

Why now: (unverified) Single thin source. An AI language-learning startup with a fresh multi-million seed will likely hire and ramp marketing, making it a candidate for growth/design/recruiting services — verify before heavy outreach.

Who to contact: Founder/CEO or Head of Marketing

Angle: Offer a growth-marketing sprint to turn the seed raise into user acquisition traction for the language-learning product.

source

CTHINGS.CO

heat 48

Trigger: €1.8M raise to power U.S. expansion (The Recursive, as of 2026-07-06)

Why now: (unverified) Single-source Edge AI startup explicitly funding U.S. expansion — a fit for GTM, recruiting and RevOps sellers, but corroborate the round before acting.

Who to contact: CEO or Head of US Expansion

Angle: Offer a lean US go-to-market and hiring plan tailored to an Edge AI hardware/software crossover team.

source

© RoundSignal. Signals sourced from public news; verify before outreach.
